voice_match_evidence: The chapter-2 voice is didactic, corrective, slightly stern — a senior teacher who has stopped explaining gently. The 2.36 engineering layer matches: 'Watching you abandon a migration mid-flight, those people will not say they had reasons in private. They will say they could not finish what they started.' The voice is direct, not sarcastic, not consoling. The closing 'no greater pain than this, for someone whose identity is the work' carries the verse's stern weight without trivializing. Coherent with 2.22 (junior-grieves-the-coat), 2.30 (close the laptop on grief and open the pull request), 2.47 (your right is to the deploy, not to the launch metrics). The engineering layer uses a similar register: specific, role-anchored, no aphorisms, no moralizing.
